Video.summary: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.
Video.title: Crawling to Vegas

Video.summary: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers expose an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she’s just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.
Video.title: First Do No Harm

Video.summary: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked. A woman asks for officers to help her rescue cats from a trailer.
Video.title: Spiked but Still Moving

Video.summary: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman. A man doesn’t deal with being laughed at by his neighbor in a peaceful way.
Video.title: Nightvision

Video.summary: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit’s help.
Video.title: Now It's Lawn Furniture

Video.summary: A man rams his wife’s car into his daughter’s car. Deputies find a rifle in a suspect’s car that was in a prior altercation. A man claims to run a travel business after deputies find evidence of id theft.
Video.title: Bumper Cars

Video.summary: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.
Video.title: Rocks in my Socks

Video.summary: Deputies prevent the delivery of a pillow stuffed with drugs. A disabled woman calls the law when a father and son get into a fist fight. Deputies confront an intoxicated man riding a bike.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Police set up a undercover operation to bust a suspect who wants to hire a hit man to kill her husband. Unknown to her, the hit man she hired is an undercover police officer. The suspect denies doing anything wrong despite all of her crimes being caught on camera.
Video.title: Hitman for Hire

Video.summary: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.
Video.title: You're Not Banksy

Video.summary: When approached by police, a suspect decides to take his shirt off and taunt the officers. Twin sisters ask for help when their third sister is threated by her boyfriend. An intoxicated suspect crashes his wife’s car into a light pole.
Video.title: No Shirt, Lots of Service

Video.summary: Rather than stop, a driver decides to lead police on a high-speed chase. A woman is shot at by her ‘sugar daddy.’ A fleeing suspect dumps a suspicious liquid out of his window.
Video.title: Pour One Out

Video.summary: A suspect leads police on an extended pursuit throughout New Orleans. When he’s flipped off by his neighbors, a man responds by firing a gun. Police pull over a Porsche and discover it’s stolen.
Video.title: Flipped Out

Video.summary: A couple calls for help when a man breaks into their home. A school bus is involved in a hit and run accident. Officer find a one gallon bag of contraband in a suspect’s car.
Video.title: A Bag, a Bus and a Break In

Image.alt: A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
A Bag, a Bus and a Break In

Video.summary: A drug dealer swallows something suspicious as deputies move in to arrest him. Deputies pull over a father with his son in the car. A woman files a kidnapping report against her own boyfriend.
Video.title: Hiding the Evidence

Video.summary: A drunk man threatens both firefighters and the police. Police are called over a dispute regarding an alleged missing dog. A drunk driver changes his story when his friend is found pinned under his car.
Video.title: Finding Fido

Video.summary: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claims that they didn’t know the car they are driving is stolen. Occupants of a vehicle claim that all of the contraband found in their car is medical equipment.
Video.title: Ignorance is an Excuse

Video.summary: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.
Video.title: Hide and Seek

Video.summary: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.
Video.title: Give Me My Money

Video.summary: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.
Video.title: Going Upstream

Video.summary: A hit and run call results in the intoxicated suspect being coaxed out of his car at gun-point. Officers respond to a stabbing and the victim is rushed to the hospital by paramedics. Officers give a tour of a newly renovated jail in Maricopa County, AZ.
Video.title: New Digs

Video.summary: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An Officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.
Video.title: Grand Theft Auto

Video.summary: Officers are called when a disturbed naked man covered in blood is spotted in a park. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.
Video.title: Naked Rental

Video.summary: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells Officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.
Video.title: Graveyard Shiftiness

Video.summary: Suspects lead Officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.
Video.title: Reckless Runners

Video.summary: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.
Video.title: That’s Not Ours

Video.summary: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen driving backwards on a one-way street.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer investigates a local bar known for illegal activity.
Video.title: Trouble Brewing

Video.summary: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when signaled to stop. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.
Video.title: Wreckless Tenants

Video.summary: A suspect bites an Officer while trying to avoid arrest. An Officer responds to a stabbing. An Officer is flagged down by a concerned group looking for a missing 4-year-old.
Video.title: Bite the Bullet

Video.summary: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting in a neighborhood. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.
Video.title: Messy Situation

Video.summary: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man’s trunk.
Video.title: Not a Momma's Boy

Video.summary: A man tries to bite an officer after narcotics are spotted in his mouth. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A suspect claims to be repaying a debt when he's caught buying drugs.
Video.title: I Always Pay My Debts

Video.summary: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.
Video.title: Skipping Rocks

Video.summary: Deputies assist border patrol in pursuit of a vehicle that has blown checkpoint and its tires. A drunk woman is pulled over not knowing she is missing a tire.
Video.title: Connect Four

Video.summary: A woman hides in her apartment after she skips out on paying her cab fare. A knife fight results in multiple calls to the police for help. A French tourist get a bus ride from Hell in Florida.
Video.title: No Money, More Problems

Video.summary: A man on the corner is questioned when he’s wearing gang colors in a gang neighborhood. A muscle car spins its tires at a stop light. A woman’s neighbor steals her ‘special’ plants.
Video.title: Rethink Your Wardrobe

Video.summary: A passenger bails from a fleeing stolen vehicle then claims that he was only getting a ride. An undercover officer pulls a sting on a handsy prostitute. An anxious lady gets nabbed for weed after calling the police on her quarrelsome husband.
Video.title: Hands Off The Junk

Video.summary: The K-9 unit responds when a gunman takes to the rooftops. A drug exchange goes awry when the dealer tries to ditch his stash. A pickup-driving drunk tries to play it off when he smashes his neighbor's parked car.
Video.title: Get Off My Roof

Video.summary: A transgender woman in a wheelchair opens a can of whoop ass on an aggressive bully. Officers find a barely dressed couple in the midst of a biting match. A reckless driver doesn’t take too kindly to being pulled over.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: A suspect goes out to get his haircut and winds up in jail. Officers try to piece together a puzzling street fight between a boxer and his confused friend. Cops give a suspect every chance to admit to his obvious crime.
Video.title: Sucker Punch

Video.summary: An extremely understanding cop gives a resistant suspect too many chances. A driver reminds us why we should never let a friend borrow our car. A man with a supped-up vehicle tells an awful lie to police.
Video.title: Turbo Charged

Video.summary: Witnesses of a car burglary assist an officer in locating the suspect. An officer investigates a fight involving a young man and a homeless gentleman. A suspect’s testimony is debunked after an eyewitness confirms that his knife wounds were self-inflicted.
Video.title: Unlucky Strikes

Video.summary: Officers enlist the help of a K-9 unit after suspects in a dangerous high-speed chase abandon their car in a residential area. A woman with visible injuries tells the Officer that her husband assaulted her after they left a drive-in. A woman sprays her boyfriend with mace when she sees him with another woman.
Video.title: Pursuit Assistance

Video.summary: Officers conduct a traffic stop and the vehicle’s occupants are taken into custody. An officer investigates a suspicious vehicle occupied by two women who turn on each other during questioning. An informant tips authorities off about drug activity at a shady motel.
Video.title: Dumbfounded

Video.summary: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while looking to score. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.
Video.title: Not Your Papi

Video.summary: A shots fired investigation results in a foot pursuit and the recovery of a discarded firearm. An officer intervenes in a family dispute involving a daughter, boyfriend and $9,000 in warrants. Three women are questioned in connection to a suspicious vehicle.
Video.title: Copy of Leave her Alone

Video.summary: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A bicyclist is charged with possession and public intoxication. A man is pulled over for expired tags.
Video.title: Pickup Pullover

Video.summary: A man with a felony warrant does his best to escape arrest. Things get weird when an agitated man tries to reveal everything to the police. A young man makes poor choices that lead to a broken home.
Video.title: Nothing to See Here

Video.summary: Cops use cameras to track a suspected motorbike thief. A K-9 unit surveys a hilltop when officers suspect a man of wrongdoing. A concerned citizen steps in to stop a pair of would-be mail thieves.
Video.title: Front Door Felony

Video.summary: An entitled young man thinks that he can command the police. A known lawbreaker eludes deputies long enough to cause serious damage. Emotions run high when a mother confronts her handcuffed son.
Video.title: Mom Still Loves You

Video.summary: A car thief is foiled by dreams of fame. In order to catch an oblivious driver's attention, officers are forced to disable his car. A woman tries to evade arrest by giving deputies a fake name.
Video.title: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

Image.alt: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

Video.summary: An armed suspect’s bloody state takes officers by surprise. The driver of a stolen car bails when he is pulled over. Officers apprehend several suspects after they spot a pair of carjacked vehicles.
Video.title: Carjacked Up

Video.summary: A man with many warrants puts up a fight when faced with jail. A desperate driver makes a last-minute attempt to hide his crime. A teenager must join the workforce after he makes a costly error.
Video.title: The Young and the Reckless

Video.summary: A high-speed car chase switches gears when the driver flees on foot. Tempers flare between neighbors after kids get physical. A nervous driver becomes irate after the police search his passenger.
Video.title: Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Image.alt: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place
Between a Bush and a Hard Place

Video.summary: A suspicious man decides to take his chances with the wrong end of a taser. A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he’s a good guy. Deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Wake Up Call

Video.summary: A wanted man complains of chest pain after he injures a fellow driver. An angry woman calls the cops over a spicy bag of chips. A violent man finally learns where his girlfriend draws the line.
Video.title: Mommy's Tears

Video.summary: An escaped felon looks to Grandma for safe haven. It’s a blast from the past when deputies pull out a security device from the ‘80s. Later, worried neighbors refuse to give a dog back to its owners.
Video.title: Manic Monday
